model_info.model_details: BGE-M3 Multilingual: Unified Fine-tuning Based on BGE-M3-Unsupervised (Dense, Sparse, and ColBERT).
Bge-Reranker-V2-V3 is a lightweight reranking model with robust multilingual capabilities, easy to deploy, and fast inference performance.

GLM-4-Air-250414 is a foundational language model. This model can execute complex tasks rapidly and has seen a significant enhancement in its capabilities for agentic tasks such as tool calling, web search and coding. GLM-4-AirX is the high-speed version of this model.

GLM-4.5-Air features a more streamlined design with a total of 106 billion parameters and 12 billion activated parameters. Optimized for tool calling, web browsing, software engineering and front-end programming, it can be integrated into code agents such as Claude Code and Roo Code, and also support any agent applications via the tool calling interface.

GLM-4-AirX is specially designed for low-latency and high-concurrency scenarios. It is pre-trained on 15 terabytes of high-quality data, with a rich set of synthetic reasoning data incorporated in particular, laying a solid foundation for subsequent reinforcement learning expansion.

GLM-4.7 is the latest flagship model of Zhipu AI. Optimized for Agentic Coding scenarios, it boasts enhanced coding capabilities, long-horizon task planning and tool collaboration, and has achieved outstanding performance among open-source models on the current leaderboards of multiple public benchmarks.

GLM-4.5V is a visual reasoning model developed by Zhipu AI based on the MOE architecture. With a total parameter count of 106 billion and an activated parameter count of 12 billion, it has achieved the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance among open-source multimodal models of the same class worldwide in various benchmark tests, covering common tasks such as image, video, document understanding and GUI-related tasks.
GLM-ASR-2512 is the new-generation speech recognition model of Zhipu AI, which supports real-time conversion of speech into high-quality text.

CogView-4 is Zhipu AI's first open-source text-to-image model that supports Chinese character generation. It has achieved all-round improvements in semantic understanding, image generation quality, and Chinese and English character generation capabilities. It supports Chinese-English bilingual input of arbitrary length and can generate images of any resolution within a specified range.

The first image generation foundation model in the Qwen series that achieves significant advances in complex text rendering and precise image editing. Experiments show strong general capabilities in both image generation and editing, with exceptional performance in text rendering, especially for Chinese.

The Tongyi Qianwen series of image editing Plus models further optimizes inference performance and system stability based on the initial Edit model, significantly reducing the response time for image generation and editing. It also supports returning multiple images in a single request, greatly enhancing user experience.

The first Tongyi Qwen image editing model extends Qwen-Image's text rendering to editing tasks. It offers precise bilingual (Chinese/English) text editing, dual visual and semantic editing, and strong cross-benchmark performance.

Doubao-Seed-1.6 is a new multimodal deep reasoning model, supporting four levels of reasoning effort: minimal, low, medium, and high. It delivers stronger model performance for complex tasks and challenging scenarios. The model supports a context window of up to 256K tokens and can generate outputs with a maximum length of 32K tokens.
Doubao-Seed-1.6-lite-251015 offers better cost-effectiveness and is the optimal choice for common tasks. It supports four levels of reasoning effort: minimal, low, medium, and high.

DeepSeek-R1 Full-Spec 671B Model delivers enterprise-grade high stability and throughput. Aligned with DeepSeek's official performance benchmarks, it matches the mathematical, coding, and natural language reasoning capabilities of OpenAI's official O1 model.

Doubao-Seed-1.8 is specifically optimized for multimodal Agent scenarios. In terms of Agent capabilities, functions such as Tool Use and complex instruction following have been significantly enhanced. For multimodal understanding, its foundational visual capabilities have been notably improved—enabling efficient processing of ultra-long videos at low frame rates—while video motion understanding, complex spatial comprehension, and structured document parsing have also been optimized. Additionally, it natively supports intelligent context management, allowing users to configure context strategies.

Seedream 4.5 is ByteDance's latest image-generation multimodal model. It integrates capabilities such as text-to-image, image-to-image, and composite image output, combining common sense with reasoning. Compared to its predecessor, version 4.0, its generation quality is significantly enhanced, featuring better editing consistency and multi-image blending clarity. It also allows for more precise control over image details, generates small text and facial features more naturally, improves image composition and color harmony, and delivers enhanced aesthetic quality.

Doubao-Embedding-Vision, the new version of the Seed-1.6-Embedding image-text multimodal embedding model, is now officially released. It is primarily designed for image-text multimodal vector retrieval scenarios, supporting image inputs as well as Chinese and English text inputs, with a maximum context length of 8K.

The Max series of Tongyi Qianwen’s image generation model excels across a wide range of generation tasks. Compared with the Plus series, it significantly reduces the “AI-like” feel in generated images, enhancing their realism. It delivers more lifelike material textures for human subjects, finer and more detailed natural textures, and more visually appealing text rendering.

Seedream 4.0 is a state-of-the-art (SOTA) multimodal image-generation model built on a leading architecture. It achieves top-tier global performance in terms of aesthetic quality, instruction-following capability, structural completeness, and subject consistency. The model employs a unified architecture to seamlessly integrate text-to-image generation and image-editing functionalities. It natively supports inputs in the form of text, single images, or multiple images, and can automatically determine the optimal image aspect ratio and quantity for generation through deep reasoning over the provided prompt. The model is capable of continuously outputting up to 15 thematically related images in a single run and supports 4K ultra-high-definition output.

DeepSeek-V3.1 is a new hybrid reasoning model launched by DeepSeek, supporting both reasoning and non-reasoning modes, and offering higher thinking efficiency compared to DeepSeek-R1-0528. Through post-training optimization, its performance in Agent tool usage and intelligent agent tasks has been significantly enhanced. It supports a context window of up to 128K tokens and can generate outputs with a maximum length of 64K tokens.

The Plus model of the Qwen3 series, effectively integrates thinking mode and non-thinking mode, allowing for mode switching during conversations. Its reasoning capabilities significantly surpass those of QwQ, and its general capabilities notably exceed those of Qwen2.5-Plus, reaching the SOTA level in the same scale within the industry.

Qwen3-based code generation model that inherits the coding agent ability of Qwen3-Coder-Plus, supports multi-turn tool interaction, focuses on optimizing repository-level understanding and increasing tool-calling stability.

The Qwen 3 series Max model has undergone specialized upgrades in agent programming and tool invocation compared to the preview version. The officially released model this time has achieved state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in its field and is better suited to meet the demands of agents operating in more complex scenarios.

Doubao-ASR-Flash is a comprehensive upgrade based on large-model speech recognition capabilities. Leveraging industry-leading proprietary Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) technology and extensive big data in the speech domain, this speech recognition large model features "more sensitive ears + a smarter brain," delivering further improved recognition accuracy.

Qwen3-based code generation model with strong coding agent power, excels at tool calling and environment interaction, capable of autonomous programming with outstanding code capability while maintaining general ability.

Qwen3 series Flash model, integrates thinking and non-thinking modes and can switch modes during dialogue. Excels at complex thinking tasks; instruction following and text understanding significantly improved. Supports 1 M context length, and uses tiered pricing.

Qwen3-ASR-Flash is a highly accurate, intelligent, and robust multilingual speech recognition model based on a large language model. Leveraging a powerful foundational model, massive amounts of text and multimodal data, and tens of millions of hours of audio data, Qwen3-ASR-Flash achieves high-precision speech recognition. It can automatically determine the language and accurately recognize speech in 11 languages, ensuring precise transcription even in complex audio environments.

GLM-4V-Flash is the first fully free image understanding model launched by Zhipu AI. It demonstrates outstanding performance in a variety of tasks including image recognition, visual question answering and visual reasoning.
GLM-4.6 is a language model developed by Zhipu AI, with a total parameter count of 355 billion and an activated parameter count of 32 billion. It has surpassed GLM-4.5 in all core capabilities.

Embedding-3 is the third-generation text vectorization model launched by Zhipu AI. It has been fully upgraded based on its predecessor, delivering stronger semantic understanding capabilities and more flexible options for vector dimensions.

Doubao-Seed-1.8 is specifically optimized for multimodal Agent scenarios. In terms of Agent capabilities, functions such as Tool Use and complex instruction following have been significantly enhanced. For multimodal understanding, its foundational visual capabilities have been notably improved—enabling efficient processing of ultra-long videos at low frame rates—while video motion understanding, complex spatial comprehension, and structured document parsing have also been optimized. Additionally, it natively supports intelligent context management, allowing users to configure context strategies.

GLM-4.6 is a language model developed by Zhipu AI, with a total parameter count of 355 billion and an activated parameter count of 32 billion. It has surpassed GLM-4.5 in all core capabilities.
A general-purpose intelligent model with stronger reasoning, more stable dialogue, and support for multimodality and long context.
Gemini 3 Pro is Google’s latest flagship general-purpose model, delivering strong performance across reasoning, generation, and multimodal tasks.
The official release of DeepSeek-V3.2 balances reasoning capabilities with output length, making it well-suited for daily use, such as in Q&A scenarios and general Agent task scenarios.
The official release of DeepSeek-V3.2 balances reasoning capabilities with output length, making it well-suited for daily use, such as in Q&A scenarios and general Agent task scenarios.

MiniMax-M2.5 is a SOTA large language model designed for real-world productivity. Trained in a diverse range of complex real-world digital working environments, M2.5 builds upon the coding expertise of M2.1 to extend into general office work, reaching fluency in generating and operating Word, Excel, and Powerpoint files, context switching between diverse software environments, and working across different agent and human teams. Scoring 80.2% on SWE-Bench Verified, 51.3% on Multi-SWE-Bench, and 76.3% on BrowseComp, M2.5 is also more token efficient than previous generations, having been trained to optimize its actions and output through planning.

Flash: fast responses, budget-friendly. Gemini Flash 2.0 offers a significantly faster time to first token (TTFT) compared to Gemini Flash 1.5, while maintaining quality on par with larger models like Gemini Pro 1.5. It introduces notable enhancements in multimodal understanding, coding capabilities, complex instruction following, and function calling. These advancements come together to deliver more seamless and robust agentic experiences.

Flash: fast responses, budget-friendly. Gemini Flash 2.0 offers a significantly faster time to first token (TTFT) compared to Gemini Flash 1.5, while maintaining quality on par with larger models like Gemini Pro 1.5. It introduces notable enhancements in multimodal understanding, coding capabilities, complex instruction following, and function calling. These advancements come together to deliver more seamless and robust agentic experiences.

2.5 low-latency multimodal workhorse. Gemini 2.5 Flash is Google's state-of-the-art workhorse model, specifically designed for advanced reasoning, coding, mathematics, and scientific tasks. It includes built-in "thinking" capabilities, enabling it to provide responses with greater accuracy and nuanced context handling.

2.5 low-latency multimodal workhorse. Gemini 2.5 Flash is Google's state-of-the-art workhorse model, specifically designed for advanced reasoning, coding, mathematics, and scientific tasks. It includes built-in "thinking" capabilities, enabling it to provide responses with greater accuracy and nuanced context handling.

2.5 Pro flagship multimodal + reasoning. Gemini 2.5 Pro is Google’s state-of-the-art AI model designed for advanced reasoning, coding, mathematics, and scientific tasks. It employs “thinking” capabilities, enabling it to reason through responses with enhanced accuracy and nuanced context handling. Gemini 2.5 Pro achieves top-tier performance on multiple benchmarks, including first-place positioning on the LMArena leaderboard, reflecting superior human-preference alignment and complex problem-solving abilities

2.5 Pro flagship multimodal + reasoning. Gemini 2.5 Pro is Google’s state-of-the-art AI model designed for advanced reasoning, coding, mathematics, and scientific tasks. It employs “thinking” capabilities, enabling it to reason through responses with enhanced accuracy and nuanced context handling. Gemini 2.5 Pro achieves top-tier performance on multiple benchmarks, including first-place positioning on the LMArena leaderboard, reflecting superior human-preference alignment and complex problem-solving abilities.

A fast, low-latency multimodal model designed for real-time interactions and lightweight tasks. Gemini 3 Flash Preview is a high speed, high value thinking model designed for agentic workflows, multi turn chat, and coding assistance. It delivers near Pro level reasoning and tool use performance with substantially lower latency than larger Gemini variants, making it well suited for interactive development, long running agent loops, and collaborative coding tasks. Compared to Gemini 2.5 Flash, it provides broad quality improvements across reasoning, multimodal understanding, and reliability.

OpenAI’s flagship general model with strong coding and agentic capabilities and steadier reasoning. GPT-5 is OpenAI’s most advanced model, offering major improvements in reasoning, code quality, and user experience. It is optimized for complex tasks that require step-by-step reasoning, instruction following, and accuracy in high-stakes use cases. It supports test-time routing features and advanced prompt understanding, including user-specified intent like "think hard about this." Improvements include reductions in hallucination, sycophancy, and better performance in coding, writing, and health-related tasks.

OpenAI’s flagship general model with strong coding and agentic capabilities and steadier reasoning. GPT-5 is OpenAI’s most advanced model, offering major improvements in reasoning, code quality, and user experience. It is optimized for complex tasks that require step-by-step reasoning, instruction following, and accuracy in high-stakes use cases. It supports test-time routing features and advanced prompt understanding, including user-specified intent like "think hard about this." Improvements include reductions in hallucination, sycophancy, and better performance in coding, writing, and health-related tasks.

Kimi K2.5 is an updated iteration of the Kimi K2 series, offering improvements over K2 in instruction-following, code generation, and agentic capabilities while maintaining competitive cost-efficiency.

Kimi K2.5 is an updated iteration of the Kimi K2 series, offering improvements over K2 in instruction-following, code generation, and agentic capabilities while maintaining competitive cost-efficiency.

Kimi K2 Thinking is a variant of Kimi K2 with extended chain-of-thought reasoning (Thinking mode), performing deep multi-step deliberation before answering, optimized for high-difficulty tasks such as mathematics, science, and complex logic.

Kimi K2 Thinking is a variant of Kimi K2 with extended chain-of-thought reasoning (Thinking mode), performing deep multi-step deliberation before answering, optimized for high-difficulty tasks such as mathematics, science, and complex logic.

DeepSeek-V3-0324 (internally referenced as deepseek-v3.1) is an updated version of DeepSeek-V3 released in March 2025, with significantly improved reasoning depth, instruction-following, and coding capabilities, retaining the same 671B-parameter MoE architecture.

imagen-3.0-generate-001 is Google's latest text-to-image model, capable of generating high-quality images based on natural language prompts. Compared to previous versions, Imagen 3.0 shows significant improvements in details and lighting effects, while also reducing visual artifacts. The model supports rendering in various artistic styles, including photorealism, impressionism, as well as abstract and anime styles.

imagen-3.0-generate-002 is Google's latest text-to-image model, capable of generating high-quality images based on natural language prompts. Compared to previous versions, Imagen 3.0 shows significant improvements in details and lighting effects, while also reducing visual artifacts. The model supports rendering in various artistic styles, including photorealism, impressionism, as well as abstract and anime styles.

imagen-3.0-fast-generate-001 is Google's latest text-to-image model, capable of generating high-quality images based on natural language prompts. Compared to previous versions, Imagen 3.0 shows significant improvements in details and lighting effects, while also reducing visual artifacts. The model supports rendering in various artistic styles, including photorealism, impressionism, as well as abstract and anime styles.

Gemini-2.5-Flash-Image is a model that excels in cost-effectiveness while offering comprehensive functionality. Gemini 2.5 Flash is best suited for large-scale processing, low-latency, high-volume, and tasks that require reasoning, as well as agent-based applications.
This model is designed specifically for professional asset creation utilizing advanced reasoning capabilities to follow complex instructions and produce high-fidelity text.

The gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview model offers high-quality image generation and conversational editing capabilities at mainstream pricing, with short latency. It is an efficient version of Gemini 3 Pro Image, optimized for scenarios requiring speed and high throughput.
GPT Image 1 is a native multimodal language model that accepts both text and image inputs and can generate image outputs.

Claude Haiku 4.5 ukjjis Anthropic's fastest and most efficient model, delivering near-frontier intelligence at a fraction of the cost and latency of larger Claude models. Matching Claude Sonnet 4's performance across reasoning, coding, and computer-use tasks, Haiku 4.5 brings frontier-level capability to real-time and high-volume applications.
Claude Opus 4.5 (2025-11-01) is a flagship AI model designed for advanced reasoning and high-precision generation, offering top-tier general intelligence and enterprise-grade reliability.

Anthropic’s newly released, high-capability model optimized for coding, complex multi-step tasks and multi-agent orchestration — excelling at breaking tasks into parallel subtasks and long-context planning.

Claude Sonnet 4.6 is a mid-tier model that, compared with Sonnet 4.5, delivers significant improvements in coding and large-scale codebase handling, complex software/computer use, 1M-token context support, instruction following, and prompt-injection resistance, while offering better cost-effectiveness.

New Sonnet 4 for general productivity and agents. Claude Sonnet 4 significantly enhances the capabilities of its predecessor, Sonnet 3.7, excelling in both coding and reasoning tasks with improved precision and controllability. Achieving state-of-the-art performance on SWE-bench (72.7%), Sonnet 4 balances capability and computational efficiency, making it suitable for a broad range of applications from routine coding tasks to complex software development projects. Key enhancements include improved autonomous codebase navigation, reduced error rates in agent-driven workflows, and increased reliability in following intricate instructions. Sonnet 4 is optimized for practical everyday use, providing advanced reasoning capabilities while maintaining efficiency and responsiveness in diverse internal and external scenarios.

New Sonnet 4 for general productivity and agents. Claude Sonnet 4.5 is Anthropic’s most advanced Sonnet model to date, optimized for real-world agents and coding workflows. It delivers state-of-the-art performance on coding benchmarks such as SWE-bench Verified, with improvements across system design, code security, and specification adherence. The model is designed for extended autonomous operation, maintaining task continuity across sessions and providing fact-based progress tracking.

Gemini 3 Pro is Google’s flagship frontier model for high-precision multimodal reasoning, combining strong performance across text, image, video, audio, and code with a 1M-token context window. Reasoning Details must be preserved when using multi-turn tool calling.

OpenAI’s flagship general model with strong coding and agentic capabilities and steadier reasoning. GPT-5 is OpenAI’s most advanced model, offering major improvements in reasoning, code quality, and user experience. It is optimized for complex tasks that require step-by-step reasoning, instruction following, and accuracy in high-stakes use cases. It supports test-time routing features and advanced prompt understanding, including user-specified intent like "think hard about this." Improvements include reductions in hallucination, sycophancy, and better performance in coding, writing, and health-related tasks.

GPT-5.2 is the latest frontier-grade model in the GPT-5 series, offering stronger agentic and long context perfomance compared to GPT-5.1. It uses adaptive reasoning to allocate computation dynamically, responding quickly to simple queries while spending more depth on complex tasks.Built for broad task coverage, GPT-5.2 delivers consistent gains across math, coding, sciende, and tool calling workloads, with more coherent long-form answers and improved tool-use reliability.
